name: Workflow Execution Probe 2026-04-16
outcome_goal: Prove file-backed Docker workflow execution end-to-end with explicit cli_llm transport, code generation, runtime context, and receipts.

jobs.label: step1_probe_codegen
jobs.prompt: In probe_math.py, implement add(a: int, b: int) -> int and add is_even(value: int) -> bool. Use ZERO from seed_contract.py when sensible. Create test_probe_math.py with pytest coverage for add and is_even across positive, negative, and zero cases. Do not modify seed_notes.md or seed_contract.py.
